responsibility_phrases: Hi Aishwarya, hope you're doing well
Maintain project plans, status reporting, and dashboards that give leadership clear visibility into progress and risk
Coordinate across PS delivery, operations, sales, and adjacent teams to remove blockers and keep work moving
Surface risks, dependencies, and resourcing gaps early, with recommended paths forward
